career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: VentureBeat AI classified as tier_3 (mid-tier source, reliability: 60%); 17 source links cited

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: weak credibility signals (1.5); contains data/benchmark references; 2447 words (depth +1.0); high citation density (6.9/1k words)

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: very high hype (10.0/10) -- claim far ahead of consensus; 5 vague patterns -- highly uncertain consensus; 17 references cited -- broad sourcing; contains counterarguments (contested area)

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: 5 vague patterns: on the roadmap, up to , might be, will reach, is going to; heavy hype language reduces specificity; 3 percentage figures (highly specific)

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: VentureBeat AI: mixed track record; 9 red flags detected (track record penalty: -3); 2 green flags detected (+1.0)
